entry.title: Variable Pay Bonus Payout - standard fields
entry.content:
Dear Community,
I'm configuring a new variable pay template for MBO and I don't understand why the individual payout doesn't show the correct amount. Here are some key points:

1. The overall rating is correctly retrieved from the performance form.
2. The Base Incentive Amount is retrieved from EC (Pay Component Group Target Bonus Amount)
3. Bonus calculation equation is Base x Individual
4. The Assignment Based is enabled but not for the Rating (the reason why is because we need to view the individual objectives in the worksheet).

In the worksheet we configure the standard fields and the expected results is to view the final payout in the Final Payout standard field. The spreadsheet will appear as below:

Overall rating 73.13
Individual target shows the base amount 2000
Individual Payout % is an editable field
Individual Payout Amount is blank
Total Incentive Payout as the base amount. If I change the Individual Payout %, it will be updated accordingly.
Expected result = 73.13x2000=1462,6 (in Individual section appears as 1460)

I'm missing some technical steps? 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Tactical Sourcing: Maximizing Benefits from this Guided Buying Channel
entry.content:
Dear @Moutrisha_Saha, 

By default, all supplier contacts are invited to participate in the RFQs submitted from Guided Buying.

When SAP Ariba Sourcing license is available, in certain scenarios it is possible to edit this list of contacts per RFQ.

And, since November release, if you also have SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance solution, it's possible to select which are supplier primary contact and bid/proposal manager and send the RFQ only to them.

Supplier contacts selection per Guided Buying RFQ scenario
In Self Service scenario (the only one available without having an SAP Ariba Sourcing license) there is no option to modify the supplier contacts invited to the RFQ.

While in other RFQ scenarios, like Low Touch, the RFQ content could be reviewed and edited in SAP Ariba Sourcing before the RFQ was published and sent to suppliers. This includes the option to edit the suppliers contacts invited to the RFQ

New "Additional Supplier Contact Information on Multi-Line Request for Quotes" in 2411 release
Now, with 2411 release, the new feature called GB-28422: Additional Supplier Contact Information on Multi-Line Request for Quotes allows Guided Buying administrators to decide whether the system, by default, will all supplier contacts to each RFQ or just the supplier's primary contact and the bid/proposal manager.

This feature is enabled with new ENABLE_SUPPLIER_CONTACT_SELECTION_IN_RFQ parameter and requires.
Prerequisites are PARAM_ENABLE_ENHANCED_RFQ_INTEGRATION and PARAM_ENABLE_EDIT_RFQ parameters that are explained in my blog above, in order to enable new GB RFQ Form and API communication that is required for all GB RFQ enhancements released since end of 2020.

Supplier's contact types are maintained in SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance solution (license required).

In summary:

  • By default all supplier contacts are invited
  • With new 2411 feature and SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance solution it's possible to define a limited list of supplier's contacts to be invited
  • With SAP Ariba Sourcing solution it's possible to edit supplier contacts that are invited by default from Guided Buying, in Low Touch and High Touch scenarios.

Kind regards,

Jorge

entry.title: Invoice RPA Bot - one mail address multiple company codes
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

i am a technical implementor of the RPA bot for Central Invoice Management 6JX. During the setup i was a bit confused because the requirement is that every "company code" needs a mail address.

I think the SAP solution is an advanced invoice solution and this should not be the case or am i wrong here? We have 15 company codes - so i need 15 shared mailboxes and our suppliers need to send their invoices to the right mail address?

How to configure 1 shared mailbox and use the OCR, machine learning, AI to route the invoice to the right company code after it was uploaded?

BR
Stephan

entry.title: Currency type 10, 30, 31 and ledgers 0L and ZL - unable to add for ZL
entry.content:
Hi

I have in material ledger currency types 10, 30 and 31. These are also set up in FINSC_LEDGER. The settings are complete for my 0L ledger for ACDOCA (31 in Free Def Crcy1) and BKPF/BSEG (31 in 3rd FI Currency).

For my local ledger ZL I am getting the following warning message:

Curr.type 31 in ledger ZL/company code 364 must be defined as FI currency

Message No. FINS_ACDOC_CUST281

However unlike for 0L ledger in ZL ledger the 3rd FI Currency field is greyed out Currently in ZL ledger I have  ACDOCA (31 in Free Def Crcy1) set, but cannot set the 3rd FI Currency as 31 which I can in 0L. Is this an issue (it is only a warning) having ACDOCA (31 in Free Def Crcy1) set and not 3rd FI Currency, and them being different in FINSC_LEDGER? Has anyone updatd 31 in 3rd FI Currency in their local ZL ledger and if so how?

Kind regards

David

entry.title: SAP IBP TS-Optimizer creating production receipts way higher than dependent production demand
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to receive your opinion over a behaviour I'm struggling to address. 

After the TS optimizer run, I found few products with excessive amount of production receipts, considering the dependent production demand they have. These products are at the lowest level of the BOM, so it's not a pushing mechanism triggered by the cost-model of some components or anything. The Inventory Target and Maximum Inventory is set to 0, and I'm running the optimizer just for 5 weeks so it's definitely not building stock ahead due to future periods demands. And yet, the production receipts are way higher than the amount it should be requested by the dependent production demand. 

Also, the minimum production lot size is 693, rounding value is 0. 

Do you have any clue on what could have triggered these production amounts? 

Thank you for you help,

Luca

entry.title: Re: CPI RFC SCC : An internal server error
entry.content:
Hi,

Please  refer to this SAP Note - https://me.sap.com/notes/0003198906

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Business Content Live model connection change
entry.content:
Created the new connection based on the Content connection name and it worked.

However , This seems to be not a great idea as do we need to create new connections for each content?

entry.title: Re: SM13 update failed while creating a PO in ECC 6
entry.content: So, because people do some comments on this question, let's add meaningful information as text: the short dump is about SAPLMEPOBADIEX, include LMEPOBADIEXU08 (function module MEPOBADIEX_COMMIT), at the line "INSERT MEPO_BADI_EXAMPL ..."

entry.title: Re: SM13 update failed while creating a PO in ECC 6
entry.content:
Looking at S/4HANA code: the function module MEPOBADIEX_COMMIT is called by MEPOBADIEX_POST, which is called by CL_EXM_IM_ME_PROCESS_OUT_CUST, which is the example implementation of BAdI ME_PROCESS_OUT_CUST.

Why do you call it?

entry.title: DDMRP - PIR is considered in one Plant and not in other
entry.content:
While calculating ADU, PIR is considered in Plant 0001 but not in another Plant 0002.

In "Mass Maintenance" and all other Apps, the same parameters were maintained for both plants.

The only difference is that Plant 0001 does not have an MRP area, but Plant 0002 has an MRP area defined with MRP type ND. 

Need help from experts on why PIR is not considered in Plant 0002 to arrive at ADU calculations.

#SAP #DDMRP #PIR

entry.title: Automated currency conversion to local currencies and keeping them on employee profile
entry.content:
Dear all,

As a global company managing its operations centrally, some payments, such as compensation and global benefits, are specified in USD. However, payroll must be processed in local currencies according to local payroll legislations. Local currency amounts can change monthly based on currency rates.

Since system do not provide any automatic currency conversion, conversion to local currency should be managed and uploaded to employee profile manually for every month. Manuel conversion is prone to human error.

We are asking for a solution. I submitted an improvement request. I am kindly asking for your votes.

Here is the link: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/336389

Request ID: 336389

Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: Re: How to convert binary base64 string to BMP image and upload to SE78 Tx. through program
entry.content: So, your base64 string contains PNG and you want to convert PNG to BMP, right? The question has been already asked, and it's not the goal of ABAP to convert formats of images. You have specialized software for that, just search.

entry.title: Re: PMR stuck in Queue without error
entry.content:
Hi @VG_REDDY 

We were suffering the same and fixed it by activating the Q in scheduler:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4cef93946a0b48ec89533b3c34443b85/c92344fa50f84667be898abba373dfba.html

Just create an entry with PR* for automatic processing the PMRs

I hope it helps!

Cheers

entry.title: Re: Utilities, SAP Pricing and Costing for Utilities
entry.content:
Hello Jatin,

Without knowing the requirement in detail, I think it is not the right approach to try to influence the amount in the invoicing document within the billing processing.
If you would like to change the sub total amount, it needs to be done during the invoicing processing. Please check if one of the following events which you can find in transaction FQEVENTS will be more suitable:
R431 or R436 or R999
Please check the documentation about the functionality of these events.

Best regards,
Katrin
SAPSUPPORT

entry.title: Re: Database Table getting updated after triggering an Idoc
entry.content:
Hi Raymond, I encountered a New Issue when copying address for multiple line item PRs.

Suppose, there are 3 line items for PR and these 3 line items have different address, in the Idoc, only the address data of the 3rd line item is getting copied for all 3 line items. This might be because, the 3rd line items is edited and saved at last. Any solution for this one ?

 

I am reading all the 3 line items in  a loop to populate the Idoc segments.

entry.title: New SAP Materials on Business AI Available for Your Classroom
entry.content:
We're excited to share with you the release of our new Quick Start Guide on SAP Business AI! This guide, with over 17 pages of selected content, was designed to help you to introduce Business AI topics, contents and resources into your classroom.

Access the new SAP Business AI Material here: Digital Library

Explore key topics such as:

  • What is AI?
  • SAP Business AI and how it works.
  • AI Ethics and its importance.
  • Customer Stories showcasing real-world applications.
  • A comprehensive SAP Business AI Learning Journey with extra resources, including online courses, podcasts, and more.

Check out also our other Quick Start Guides and explore other SAP materials to enhance your teaching experience: Guías SAP para Clase - SAP Community & Guias SAP para Sala de Aula - SAP Community

Have questions or feedback? Let us know in the comments!

entry.title: Identify the workflow and the business rule that fired it
entry.content:
I begin with Workflow Request.

I wish to work backwards to find:
a. The workflow that was fired.
b. the business rule that fired the workflow.

TIA,

sandy

I wis

entry.title: Re: Find which DTP has a filter with ABAP routine
entry.content:
Hi

Check the program RSBK_DTP_PROPERTIES.

See SAP Note:

2898733 Report for determination of DTP properties

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: Creation Large amount of Meter Reading Orders via ISU_S_METERREAD_CREATE | MSG EL422
entry.content:
Hello,
please do not use function module ISU_S_METERREAD_CREATE directly but 
BAPI_MTRREADDOC_UPLOAD instead.

Best regards,
Katrin 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAC setDimensionFilter script
entry.content: Thank you, After 4 years. Your solution reached me!

entry.title: Clean Core on-prem, pratical meaning
entry.content:
Hi all,

we're running S/4 HANA 2023 FP1 on-prem. We came from ECC system by brownfield approach. This means, we simply migrated our 20+yrs development Z-objects over.

Now I want to clean up this mess and become more clean core compliant. To be honest, we can't be even more far away from clean core compliant. Also there are currently no plans to move to any cloud scenario. But at least I want to be prepared.

I read through lots of blogs, Devtoberfest and TechEd and now have a good feeling of what clean core means. Now I try to analyze our clean core index struggling with what it means.

What is clear to me is:
- get rid of user exists (~130)
- get rid of modifications (~850)
- get rid of SAPScript (~50)
- get rid of implicit enhancements.

What about all the other objects? 
- DDIC domains, data elements tables
- BTE events
- function modules (several hundret)
- Z-report and includes (~2000)
- SQ01/SQ02
- copy rules (SD), which are some kind of modification
- alreads implemented BAdI

We will not become 100% clean core compliant but I want to get as close as possible. Especially all these Z-reports drives me crazy. What does clean core means for these? Do I need to replace all of them by custom API and new UI to become compliant? We still use only few Fiori Apps and most users and processes stick to SAP GUI.

Do I need to supersed each funciton module with an API?
In SD there are many modifications like copy rules or condition rules. How to replace these?

How to handle all BAdI implementations already done? They're not visible in "Custom Code and Logic" App and I don't think it makes sense to re-implement them there?

Which other objects do I need to take into account? As a first indicator, I try to change ABAP language and found that several objects (like reports or FM) doesn't support this. Is this a valid approach?

Greets from the beginning of a long journey
BR Patrick

entry.title: Re: How to read environment variable of project of SAP Build Process Automation in Script Task
entry.content:
Hello Weiss,

Thank you for reaching out. Please find the guidance on using environment variables attached. Examples begin on page 55 (https://help.sap.com/doc/0ff61ed2d1334ed7804f77cd38cb708e/Cloud/en-US/a0b24deefff14ba9b7cb32b38b9793d5.pdf)

Feel free to reach out if you need further assistance.

entry.title: Templates on Disclosure Management
entry.content:
In this blog, we’ll take a step-by-step approach to demystify templates in Disclosure Management. From creation to configuration and application, you’ll learn practical tips and best practices to build and use templates that streamline your reporting workflows.

Let’s get started on creating templates that work smarter, not harder!

 

The Report Template defines the overall structure of the Report, including headers, footers, page numbering, text and sections.

  • This ensures that all Reports generated within SAP DM follow a consistent format.
  • It controls the placement of content such as tables, charts and textual data, ensuring they are positioned appropriately throughout the Report.

While Templates provide a standardized base, users can still make custom adjustments to fit specific reporting needs, such as adding custom footnotes, sections or disclaimers.

DM custom styles are recommended to use due to possible issues with file opening by someone with different default styles, for stable content refresh and ad-hoc previewing - please check note 2448528: https://me.sap.com/notes/2448528 for word formatting, styles and templates⁠.

 

Create a Template

When you want to create a Template for the Report, click on the full report and go to "Templates" tab.

In this tab, there will be three options:

  1. Available Templates
  2. Upload Templates
  3. Delete Templates

1. Available Templates

In this option you can check on the available Templates already existing and if needed you can Edit it by selecting the Template you want to edit and clicking on "Edit" button.

2. Upload Templates

In this option you can either upload an already existing Template from your files or build a new Template and upload it by clicking on "Choose File" > "Open" > "Add Template".

Here you can upload different Templates such as cover page, auditor's report, chapters, etc.

Word Template and styles logic in SAP DM

Master Template – defines report styles, headers, footers, etc.

Chapter N.doc – for each chapter you define Chapter configuration. Chapter has content, it might not have header and footer which can be inherited from the Master Template for the Word Report.

In case you use a different font in a chapter and you don’t want to change it (for example you used Calibri but you wanted to use Arial), you can define that the Word Report will be getting the style from the Master Template (define the style there). This will allow you not to go to each chapter and change the style there – just define it in Master Template and use it for Word Report.

In case one chapter has its own style, for example a different header and footer and you want to use it in the Word Report, mention it in the Chapter configuration.

As previously mentioned, it is recommended to create DM styles that are not based on any of the standard Word styles. In Word, select the Home tab and open styles and click on "Add style". Fill the properties and formatting accordingly to the style wanted. To better identify the styles created, it is recommended to give the style a name starting by "DM_stylename", for example "DM_BodyText".

Once the Template is finished, please notice that when saving the Template, you have to save it as "Word Template" as you can see in the picture below:

3. Delete Templates

In case you want to delete a Template, select the Template you want to delete and click on "delete" as you can see below:

 

Configuration on chapter level

You will then have to choose configuration options for each chapter. Set these configurations by clicking in each chapter and then click on the "Configuration" tab.

The entire documents gets generated by combining chapters.

This is done based on these parameters on chapter level.

Before creating the final Report, you should set configuration for all the chapters.

Open the top Report level, check on the Template you want to use - you must mention one of the Templates from this top Report level Template for each chapter in "Configuration" tab. 

The most common template should be called "Default.docx" because that's the default input in chapter configuration, when chapter is just created.

In this case, the only available Template is "Default.dotx"

When setting the configuration for Template name mention one of the Report Template's that you have available as you can see in the pictures below:

Once this is done, you will be able to create the Report with the corresponding Template to each chapter.

 

Applying Template

In case you have done any changes in Template that you want to apply to the rest of the chapters, there is a quick way to apply those changes.

Go to Report level, click on "lock" to lock Report and chapters > click on "Rollout templates" and all chapters will be updated according to the Report's Template > click on "Unlock" and the changes will be applied.

entry.title: Standard Audit File-Tax (SAF-T) - Statutory Reporting in Poland (JPK) - SAP Product Strategy
entry.content:
Are you working in a fast-paced legal environment that is demanding more transparency and adherence to reporting regulations? Join our webinar to gain insight into the evolving legal landscape and how it affects your SAP environment!

This webinar is a great opportunity to learn about the changes and get ready for the future. It will help ensure that the SAP solutions in your organization follow the current legal rules.

AGENDA
1. Regulatory Requirements for SAF-T in Poland
- 2024 requirements
- 2025-2026 upcoming Law changes
2. Introduction to transition topic
- SAP SAF-T Strategy
- ‘SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements’ – End of Life
3. ‘SAP Document and Reporting Compliance’ way forward
4. 'Transition from SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements’ to ‘SAP Document and Reporting Compliance’
5. Q&A Session

This webinar will be conducted in English. A Polish version of the webinar will be conducted on December 10, 2024 at 10:00 AM CET. If you would like to attend the Polish webinar, please register here.

Learn more about the webinar here. 

SPEAKERS:
Alexsandra Zanetti, Product Manager, Cross Product Management Team, SAP

Erika Buson, Product Manager, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, SAP
Janina Ziegler, Product Management ‘SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements’, SAP

Registration link

entry.title: Re: Vendor: Withholding Tax NOT extended in new company code
entry.content:
Hi raymond!

We checked that note but Its the same business partner. I created in "company code" section for the BP with reference the other company code. Then I control that but the only place where the data wasnt replicate is in Vendor: Withholding Tax.

We resolved using XK99 as a workaround. However we want to know if its possible that when you extended the supplier for other company code this data appears. THK!

entry.title: Excel export from another page in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create script Button (in a Popup)  to export in Excel table from different page in my Story in SAC but the code is giving me error - the table is coming from different page.

Do you know a workaround for the script so it can take the respective table?

ExportToExcel_2.exportReport();

entry.title: Error Message 005 retroactive posting not allowed
entry.content:
When I try to change the item on the provisioning sheet, according to the invoice in ML81N, I get the message “005 retroactive posting not allowed”.

Provisioning Dec/2023; invoice Jan/2024

How could I resolve this issue?

Tks in advance.

entry.title: Mashup Callback passing data to fill subject or other fields - SAP Sales and Services Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hello guys,

 

I have a problem and can't find any solution for it. I created a Mashup and implemented a navigation to quickcreate a Case in SAP Sales and Services Cloud V2. I would like to fill in some fields like the subject or a custom field within my Javascript but I cant't find anything to pass the information to the navigation.

Here is the code from the documentation:

 

 var case={operation:"navigation", params: {routingKey: "case", viewType:"quickcreate"}};
    window.parent.postMessage(ticket, '*')

 

Is there any way to pass data to the quickcreate dialog? 

 

 

Link to the documentation: Docs

I suspect the culprit is SAP's UI5 Language Assistant extension. 

Has no one else got this error? It pops up every 5 minutes or so.

entry.title: Re: Editable Hierarchical List using Fiori Element List R...
entry.content: Thank you, information was useful. 🙂

entry.title: How to Use and Configure the Transport Center Tool for SuccessFactors: Tips and Tricks
entry.content:
SuccessFactors, SAP's cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) suite, offers a variety of tools to streamline HR processes. One key tool within SuccessFactors is the Transport Center Tool, a critical component for managing and migrating configurations across different SuccessFactors environments. Whether you're moving configurations from a development to a test environment, or transferring them to production, mastering the Transport Center is essential for ensuring that your changes are implemented seamlessly.

In this blog post, we'll explore how to use and configure the Transport Center tool for SuccessFactors and provide you with some helpful tips and tricks to make the process more efficient.

What is the Transport Center Tool?

The Transport Center Tool in SuccessFactors is a central hub that facilitates the migration of configurations and customizations across different environments (such as Development, Testing, and Production) within your SuccessFactors landscape. It helps manage changes made to your SuccessFactors instance and ensures that those changes can be transferred safely and efficiently between environments.

Some of the common use cases for the Transport Center include:

  • Moving configuration changes from one environment to another.
  • Transporting metadata, such as employee data models or custom objects.
  • Managing system updates.

The CTC helps maintain consistency and control over your SuccessFactors configuration by offering a structured way to handle these changes.

How to Access the Transport Center Tool in SuccessFactors

Before diving into the configuration of the Transport Center, you first need to access the tool. Here’s how to do that:

  1. Login to SuccessFactors: Use your administrator credentials to log into the SuccessFactors system.
  2. Navigate to the Admin Center: Once logged in, go to the Admin Center by clicking on the "Admin Center" tab in the top menu.
  3. Search for the Transport Center: In the Admin Center, use the search bar to look for the "Transport Center" tool. Click on the search result to open the Transport Center interface.

If you have the necessary permissions, you'll be able to configure and manage the transport jobs from here.

Key Features of the Transport Center Tool

Before configuring the Transport Center, it’s helpful to understand its key features:

  • Transport Jobs: These are the individual tasks that represent a configuration change or set of changes that need to be moved from one environment to another.
  • Import and Export: You can export configuration changes from one environment and import them into another.
  • Package Management: Transport jobs can be grouped into packages for easier management and tracking.
  • Version Control: Transport jobs maintain versioning, making it easy to track changes and revert to previous configurations when necessary.

Step-by-Step Guide to Using the Transport Center Tool

Step 1: Create a Transport Job

Creating a transport job is the first step in using the Transport Center tool. Here's how to create one:

  1. In the Transport Center interface, click on Create Transport Job.
  2. Give your transport job a meaningful name (for example, "Employee Central Config Changes").
  3. Select the Source System (the environment you're exporting from) and the Target System (the environment you're importing to).
  4. Choose the Configuration Type. This could be anything from Employee Central, Recruiting, or Performance Management depending on what you're migrating.
  5. Once the job is created, you’ll need to add the objects or configurations that you want to transport. Click Add Object and select the items you want to include in the job.

Step 2: Export the Transport Job

Once you've created the transport job and added the necessary configurations, it’s time to export it.

  1. In the Transport Center interface, locate the transport job you just created.
  2. Click on Export. This action will prepare the job for migration from the source system to the target system.
  3. Depending on the size of the transport job and the number of configurations, the export process may take a few minutes.

Step 3: Import the Transport Job

After exporting, you’ll need to import the transport job into the target system.

  1. In the Transport Center, switch to the Target System.
  2. Locate the exported transport job under Available Jobs.
  3. Click on Import to begin the transfer process. The system will check the job and ensure all configurations are compatible before proceeding.
  4. Once the import is successful, verify that the configurations are correctly applied in the target system.

Step 4: Test the Transport Job

It’s crucial to test that everything is working as expected after the transport job has been completed. This is especially important in environments like testing or production.

  1. Log into the target environment (for example, the test or production environment).
  2. Check that the configurations, metadata, or custom objects have been correctly applied.
  3. Conduct thorough testing to ensure that everything is functioning as expected. If issues arise, you may need to revise the transport job or troubleshoot any compatibility problems.

Best Practices for Using the Transport Center Tool

While the Transport Center tool is relatively straightforward, here are some best practices to keep in mind for a smooth experience:

1. Use Descriptive Names for Transport Jobs

Give your transport jobs meaningful names that will help you and your team quickly identify what each job does. A clear naming convention (such as "EC_Config_Changes_Dev_to_Test") helps avoid confusion, especially when managing multiple transport jobs. Also try to differentiate fix and enhancements bundles to help the identification of possible bundle errors.

2. Test in a Non-Production Environment

Always test your transport jobs in a non-production environment (such as a sandbox or testing environment) before moving them to production. This helps identify any issues early on and ensures that the configuration works as expected without disrupting live operations.

3. Use Transport Packages

For larger projects, group related transport jobs into packages. This allows you to manage related configurations together and reduces the complexity of transporting them individually. Packages can be version-controlled, making rollback easier if something goes wrong.

4. Monitor Transport Job Status

Keep an eye on the status of your transport jobs to ensure everything is running smoothly. Use the monitoring tools in the CTC to track job progress and quickly identify any issues or errors.

5. Follow Version Control Best Practices

It’s important to keep track of the versions of the configurations you’re transporting. Always document changes and maintain version control to ensure you can easily roll back to a previous version if needed.

6. Caution with release cycles

During the gap between preview and production you may get some errors related to software versions differences, so please plan ahead your transportations

7. Search is tricky

During the search, if you change de filter criteria and click on go, you will not get any info, instead of it, you need to click on the left inside configuration area.

8. Isn't the tool to copy all configurations

You have the limitation on 300 results per search and 50 items per bundle, so if you plan to move a lot of configuration, you will need to break it in several bundles.

9. Attention on RBP copy

If you try to copy groups with filters that point out to data that doesn't exist you will get an error, so be sure you have all the relevant data before copy RBP

 

Troubleshooting Tips

Even with careful planning, issues may arise. Here are some troubleshooting tips for common issues you might encounter:

  • Transport Job Fails: Check the error message and verify that the configuration in the source and target environments is compatible. Sometimes, a mismatch in versions or missing dependencies can cause a transport job to fail.
  • Configuration Not Appearing: If the configuration doesn’t appear in the target environment after the import, verify the transport job’s log for errors and confirm that the import process was completed successfully.
  • Permissions Issues: Ensure you have the appropriate permissions to access and manage the Transport Center. Lack of permissions can prevent you from creating, exporting, or importing transport jobs.

Conclusion

The CTC in SuccessFactors is an essential utility for moving configurations across environments. Whether you're updating a single object or migrating an entire set of configurations, mastering the Transport Center helps ensure that changes are made safely and consistently. By following best practices, naming conventions, and thorough testing, you can avoid common pitfalls and streamline your SuccessFactors configuration management process.

Now that you have a better understanding of how to use and configure the Transport Center tool, you can implement these tips and tricks to maximize its effectiveness and ensure successful migrations every time. Happy transporting!

entry.title: SAP CAP nodeJS .drafts undefined
entry.content:
Hello,

all my SELECT's of .drafts entities are failing as .dafts is undefined.

working with sap/cds 8.5.0.

Anybody else the problem. Using a string representation works... but is ugly 😉

entry.title: Re: REVIEW: New Layout / Features for SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Thanks for writing …others have noticed this too …  I have alerted dev and will post anything I hear … currently traveling for SAP TechEd in UK 🙂

entry.title: value date is not shown in the "Display Line item in general ledger"
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

 

We are not able to reconcile bank entry based on value date. As the value date column in not shown in the "Display Line item in general ledger."  Please resolve the same as soon as possible as it is creating  a lot of chaos and we are not able to track payment based on value date.

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: value date is not shown in the "Display Line item in...
entry.content:
The value date field is not available in the Display Line Items in the General Ledger App. If you want to add it, you need to create a custom field. 

kindly go through the below SAP help portal for your reference:-
Add Extension Fields for the Display Line Items in General Ledger App | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Help Us Improve The SAP Integration Suite Documentation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Integration Suite users,

We’re conducting a survey focused on the quality of the SAP Integration Suite documentation – and we need your valuable input! We want to know about your experiences, challenges, and suggestions related to our documentation.

Click here to take the survey

Why are we doing this?

Our goal is to ensure that our documentation is as helpful, clear, and comprehensive as possible. We want to empower you to make the most of SAP Integration Suite, and excellent documentation is key to achieving that.

Why should you participate?
  • Shape the future of our documentation: Your feedback will directly influence how we improve and structure our documentation moving forward.
  • Help fellow users: By sharing your insights, you'll be helping us create better resources for the entire user community.
  • It's quick and easy: The survey won't take more than 2 minutes of your time.

By taking a few minutes to complete our survey, you are directly contributing to the improvement of our Integration Suite documentation. Your feedback will help us create a better experience for all users.

Thank you for your support,
The SAP Integration Suite User Assistance Team

entry.title: Re: Database Table getting updated after triggering an Idoc
entry.content: XADRC is an internal table, with luck you should find different address numbers, else try to navigate in debug

entry.title: Consumo de FUE no SAP S/4HANA Cloud: uma visão geral em português
entry.content:
Há um mês atrás, li um post no LinkedIn , da Melorine Parsy, que me deixou, no mínimo, curiosa! O post iniciava assim:

 

  • 73% dos clientes de ECC entendem parcialmente ou não entendem a estrutura de licenciamento da SAP.

 

Ela estava falando especificamente do licenciamento de SAP S/4HANA, para pensar e planejar um projeto de conversão ou migração do ECC ao SAP S/4HANA.

 

Independente da porcentagem ser esta ou não, fiquei intrigada e pensando como poderia minimizar este gap de conhecimento. E seja você cliente ou parceiro, deixo aqui um vídeo para que você possa iniciar seu conhecimento e saber onde mais buscar informações.

 

Mas antes do vídeo, já digo que a venda atual de RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition é feita com base em FUE (Full Use Equivalent), que categoriza o tipo de uso que o usuário terá no sistema: Advanced, Core, Self-service ou Developer. E isso é baseado nas autorizações/permissões que os usuários têm.

Existem dois artigos bem explicativos que falam de FUE, escritos por @pascalrenet, que sugiro a leitura:

Parte 1: Did you say FUE? A definition.

Parte 2: Thoughts on how to plan, monitor and control your FUE usage

 

Poxa, mas não sou vendedor, porque tenho que saber isso?

 

FUE se traduz em autorizações que o usuário tem para acessar o sistema SAP S/4HANA.

Lembra da transação SU01 no SAP ECC para criar e atribuir permissões a um usuário? Como você, consultor, fará essa atribuição no SAP S/4HANA? E as autorizações dadas aos usuários estão de acordo com os a quantidade de licenças (FUE) compradas pelo cliente? Aliás, você fez handover com o time de vendas para eles lhe contarem sobre o que foi vendido, certo?

 

Ou então você é um Customer Success Manager/Partner e está acompanhando e monitorando o uso e consumo de FUE’s do seu cliente. Você sabe explicar a métrica ao seu cliente? Você consegue interagir com o time de projeto ou consultoria para guiar qual report pode ser executado no SAP S/4HANA para ter detalhes de usuários vs. FUE?

 

 

No vídeo, de apenas 10 minutos, meu intuito é lhe mostrar rapidamente:

✔️O que está incluso na licença de RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition?

✔️Como as autorizações dos usuários do S/4HANA refletem no consumo de FUE?

✔️Como monitorar uso e consumo de FUE do ambiente S/4HANA Cloud?

 

Todos os sites apresentados estão na descrição do vídeo, para você navegar, aprender e disseminar o conhecimento.

entry.title: Where can I learn how to configure key record to report elements in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring the Record-to-Report Process in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey empowers business users and consultants to configure key Record-to-Report elements that are essential for effective month-end close processes. This knowledge is particularly beneficial when defining and designing business processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Learning objectives
Upon completing this learning journey, you will be able to configure advanced valuation of foreign currency and reclassification of payables/receivables, execute and review validation rule runs, and utilize these processes effectively during month-end close to ensure accuracy and compliance.

Prerequisites

  • Designing the Record-to-Report Process in SAP S/4HANA

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Production order without material issue
entry.content:
Hi,

For repair/rework, you can try to set the Type field of the production order as Special. Then you can set the child item to be the same as the parent item.

Here is the example of repair production order

Hope this helps

SonTran

entry.title: Re: synchronization between employee and business partner...
entry.content:
Hello,

When an employee has two or more personnel numbers, the first BP is always created with role BUP003 (employee) for the first personnel number.

For creating an additional BP for the second personnel number, the second personnel number must have a bank account maintained in infotype 9 and maintain a reference BP (with vendor) for the company code of the second personnel in view PTRV_VENDOR_SYNC.

There are some fields which are mandatory at vendor side, such as as the reconciliation account, that do not exist in HR, so the value of this fields is copied from the reference BP from view PTRV_VENDOR_SYNC.

entry.title: Re: SFP Adobe forms align table content in a cell
entry.content:
Pls try to 'Wrap in SubForm' the cell-table, it should work...

Flavio

entry.title: Re: Error in groovy script - The entity "nbsp" was refere...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can add the following lines to your code:

    // Get the body of the message as a String
    def body = message.getBody(String)

    // the below code solves the non-breaking space issue
    String nbspHTML = ' '
    String nbspXML = ' '
    body = ((String)body).replaceAll(nbspHTML, nbspXML)

BR,

Andrzej

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Integration failed on employment role
entry.content:
Hello,

It is not a very common error.

Can you check if note 3264708 can be installed? Otherwise, installing it should fix it.

entry.title: How to read Table AB in Payroll run to idetify special situations
entry.content:
Hello, I have the following challenge. As part of the payroll run, I have to evaluate the internal table AB with the absences. I have to check whether there are absences with a special evaluation rule. If this is the case, I have to check whether they start on the first of the month. Unfortunately, I can't find a procedure call that I can use to do this. Even if I have a calculation rule that evaluates this problem, I don't know how to call this calculation rule in the payroll schema. The PIT and Actio functions don't work here. Does anyone have a tip? The rule itself would then look like this:

 


But how to call the rule form the  parent schema?????

What is the overall major need?
In Case there are absenes that leed to a defined valuation rule like this


and this happens on the first of the month, then i have to kick out a bonus payment.

So i have to search for a  possibility to identify this situation.

 



Thomas

entry.title: Re: Change credit segment for sales area -- query on impact

former_member283293 

hello,

 

we are facing same issue and we implemented sap note # 3430247 but still dealing with same issue.

it looked promising but unfortunately did not work.

did you already fix this?

thanks

entry.title: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

i want to bind a bound function to an control as described here: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/b54f7895b7594c61a83fa7257fa9d13f

we have great examples for unbound functions:

 

<VBox id="getAvailableItems" binding="{path : '/GetAvailableItems(...)', parameters : {$select : ['ProductName', 'ProductId']}}">
    <List id="xyz" items="{value}">
        <items>
            <ObjectListItem title="{ProductName}" />
        </items>
    </List>
</VBox>

 

but for bound functions only the js part is referenced:

 

var ...
    oSalesOrderContext = oTable.getSelectedItem().getBindingContext(),
    oAction = oModel.bindContext("name.space.InvoiceCreated(...)", oSalesOrderContext);
 
oAction.invoke()...

 

I've been trying to do this directly with a binding in the xml view for some time now, but it doesn't work. Has anyone got it working?

entry.title: Cancel maintenance operation confirmation in public cloud
entry.content: Cancel maintenance operation confirmation in public cloud (fiori apps equivalent to tcode IW45 in on-premises version)

entry.title: Re: Variant Configuration - Object Dependencies - CEIL Fu...
entry.content:
Hi Brian,

another possibility to replace CEIL is to get the integer value after having added 0.5 to the formula result, something like this:

$self.TC_BOM_QTY = TRUNC (( MDATA $self.TC_BOM_QTY / TC_PC_PER_BOARD ) + 0.5)

Hope it will work...

Flavio

entry.title: Re: Define Account Assignment Cat. and Document Type for Purchase Requisitions- Grey out(SAP PM)
entry.content:
Hi Terence Sir / Peter,

In my case I am able to display/edit V_TCOKT_PM

But why can't I see the configuration path in spro node (S/4 HANA 2023) [Path--> SPRO-->Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-->Maintenance and Service Processing-->Maintenance and Service Orders-->General Data-->Define Account Assignment Cat. and Document Type for PR]

@MTerence @peter_atkin Please guide.

Thanks,

Sumanta

entry.title: SAC - Model - Account - entry for "Units & Currencies" disappears
entry.content:
Hi Community,

since we have the new update on 18.11.2024 on our tenant, we are facing this problem:

In the account dimension in the model, entries in the column "Units & Currencies" are disappearing. If I enter this information again, it will be disappear the next day. This leads to errors in the currency conversion.

Do you have any ideas?

Let me know if you need more information.

Data is coming from BW, using daily import jobs.

Kind regards,
Eric

entry.title: Re: Object dependency syntax in superbom
entry.content:
What about something like this?

CHAR_2 = 'B' AND CHAR_8 <> 'D'

entry.title: VS Code Extension constantly opens cds-rc.json file
entry.content:
I'm using the SAP CDS Language Support extension for VS Code. Every few minutes a file called cds-rc.json opens in the editor, in place of the file I'm working on.  Is there a way to disable this?

I'm on the latest version of the extension (v8.5.0)

entry.title: SAP Business Client & SAP GUI: Not launching GUI for Windows
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we are trying to experiment with the hybrid Fiori/GUI expierence, described in this Devtobertfest session: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ihxl85uXrjc

We have installed the newest versions of NWBC and GUI on a local machine and created a connection with type "Fiori launchpad", the GUI fallback is set to "SAP GUI for Windows". FLP can be opened and operated without problems.

However, when we try to launch a classical transaction like VA02, NWBC does not launch an embedded version of SAP GUI for Windows but instead tries to launch SAP GUI for HTML (which fails with an error saying "This location is not explicitly marked as safe in Internet Explorer zone model").

Are we missing a setting here? The way I understood the session was that SAP NWBC should not launch the webgui service but an embedded version of SAP GUI for Windows? Otherwise there would be no point in using NWBC over the browser based FLP.

entry.title: How to configure Work Center for complex situation of determining machine capacity
entry.content:
Hi Product Experts,

Please guide on the below unqiue situation.  

We have complex situation of configuring work centre for capacity planning due to combination of machine, tool width, tool characterises.

  • There are several machines and multiple tools which can run on each machine either specifically or alternatively. Some tools are very specific to the machine, while other tools can be adopted on other machines in case of capacity overload.
  • Tool characteristics consists of one or more surfaces and density of output it can produce.
  • The machine capacity/output is determined by the tool width and tool characteristics as it produces unique output.

Work centre, tool width and surface combinations and variations

There is 5 hours set up time for every change in Tool from A to B and so on.

There is 30 minutes set up time for change in tool characteristics i.e. surface and density.

Based on above information below is situation for illustration:

On Machine 100 three different tools A, B, C can be installed, and each of the tool has different width and tool characteristics in which output can be produced.

The machine can run with one of the tools (A/B/C) and surface (SW/LV) at a time, the available capacity is cumulation of the output from the machine with different tool settings (A+B+C) and surface.

All tools are not freely interchangeable between machine 100, 200 and 300.  Some Tools have no alternate machines on which they can run, they are tied with the machine. Like Tool B, C, D, F and G are specific to machine.  While Tool A can be installed on Machine 100 and 200, but on Machine 200 tool D get priority as it doesn’t have alternate machine on which it can run. Likewise, Tool E can also be installed on Machine 200 and 300, but on machine 300 tools F and G gets priority as they don’t have alternate machine on which they can run.

Problem statement

  • How to create work centre which can handle combination of machine and tool with the objective to keep tool setup time and characteristics change over time to minimum?
  • Production controller must be able to plan the orders in sequence without need to change tool frequently as this would reduce the overall availability of machine for production.
  • Capacity evaluation of the work centre in combination of machine and tool must be at once in single view.

Shabbir Kachwala

entry.title: SAP-Ariba-Help-Center – Lieferanten erhalten Support
entry.content:
Thank you to my my colleague Rebecca Dolan who help in translating this blog.

SAP-Ariba-Lieferanten können Support erhalten, indem sie einen Rückruf von der SAP-Ariba-Supportseite anfordern.

So gehen Sie vor:

Gehen Sie auf https://support.ariba.com/help.

Dies führt Sie zu dem folgenden Screen (Sie müssen sich keine Sorgen machen, wenn Sie sich nicht anmelden können).

Die Sprache kann über das Dropdown-Symbol in der oberen rechten Ecke geändert werden.

Wählen Sie eine der folgenden Optionen aus.

Sie können eine Beschreibung Ihrer Anfrage eingeben. Wählen Sie Suche, um relevante Artikel zu erhalten, die bei Ihrer Frage helfen könnten.

Wenn die Artikel Ihre Anfrage nicht beantworten, können Sie mit einem SAP-Support-Mitarbeiter sprechen, indem Sie auf

Kontakt in der linken oberen Ecke klicken.

Wählen Sie dann Anmeldungshilfe, wie im Screenshot gezeigt

Hier sehen Sie dann weitere Optionen angezeigt. Wählen Sie bitte Ich habe ein anderes Problem, um fortzufahren.

Rechts unten könne Sie nun auf Fall erstellen klicken.

Ganz oben haben Sie die Möglichkeit die Sprache auszuwählen, in der Sie kontaktiert werden möchten.

Füllen Sie dann alle erforderlich Felder (mit roten Sternchen) im Formular aus, und gehen Sie sicher, dass Sie am Ende des Formulars das Häkchen bei Ich stimme zu setzten.

Sie müssen Details zu Ihrem Problem sowie Ihre Kontaktdaten eingeben. Bitte geben Sie auch Ihre ANID-Nummer an. Sie finden Ihre SAP-Ariba-Network-ID (ANID), sobald Sie auf Ihrem SAP-Ariba-Konto angemeldet sind. Die ANID-Nummer Ihres Kontos wird angezeigt, wenn Sie oben rechts in der Anwendung auf Ihre Initialen > Einstellungen klicken.

Nachdem Sie Ihre Details eingegeben haben, können Sie unten rechts auf Ein letzter Schritt klicken.

Sie sehen nun ein Telefonsymbol und die geschätzte Wartezeit. Sie können auswählen, ob der Anruf aufgezeichnet werden soll.

Der letzte Schritt zum Anfordern eines Rückrufs vom SAP-Ariba-Supplier-Support-Team besteht darin, Ihren Fall einzureichen, indem Sie auf OK klicken.

SAP-Ariba-Käufer

Für den Käufersupport gehen Sie bitte auf SAP for Me.

Wenn Sie Probleme beim Zugriff auf SAP Ariba haben, wenden Sie sich an die Ihnen zugewiesene Support-Kontaktperson (Designated Support Contact).

Die Ihnen zugewiesene Support-Kontaktperson finden Sie unter Administration & Mehr -> Kontakte.

3121688 - S-User-ID-Berechtigungen für Zugriff auf zugewiesene Support-Kontaktperson oder einfachen Zugriff - SAP Ariba Connect

Wenn Sie weitere Unterstützung vom SAP-Ariba-Support benötigen, können Sie einen Fall in SAP for Me Portal anlegen. Dazu benötigen Sie eine S-User-ID, die die benötigten Berechtigungen hat um Fälle anzulegen.

Informationen zum Anlegen eines Falls finden Sie unter 1296527 - Anlegen eines support-Falls für SAP Support - SAP for Me.

Danke fürs Lesen!

Wir hoffen, dass Sie diesen Artikel hilfreich fanden. Sie können sich jederzeit gerne an das Customer Interaction Center wenden, wenn Sie Hilfe mit den oben aufgeführten Schritten benötigen.

Wir würden gerne von Ihnen hören, lassen Sie uns wissen, was Sie denken?

Lesen Sie hier mehr Blogbeiträge vom Customer Interaction Center!

Weitere verwandte Themen

 SAP Ariba Network für Lieferanten: Häufig gestellte Frage

Wie wende ich mich als Lieferant an den SAP-Business-Network-Kundensupport?

Hier können Sie eine Demo anfordern oder sich an das SAP-Ariba-Sales-Team wenden.

entry.content:

I have defined an action with an abstract entity and popup appears.

Is it possible to define Enter Keypress as submit in the popup(instead of need of pressing action Button)?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Change credit segment for sales area -- query on impact
entry.content: Hi Edina, thank you for the response. I transferred the open FI documents to the new credit control area in our development system. But the oldest open item, KPI, etc. in the customer master are still in the old credit segment. This data is not reflected in the new credit segment data. Is this standard? Or are there any other steps to be done for this?

entry.title: SAP RAP Search ID and Text
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using  the following:

@search.searchable: true

define view entity ZC_SCAN02TP

as projection on ZR_SCAN02TP as EM_SCAN

{

key ItemScanUUID,

ParentUUID,

@ObjectModel.text.element: ['ProductText']

@search.defaultSearchElement: true

@search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.90

@search.ranking: #HIGH

MaterialID,

@ui.hidden: true

_ProductText.ProductName as ProductText

}

In SAP RAP text search if I search for Material Description i have successful results, but if I search for material ID not working.

If I comment @ObjectModel.text.element: ['ProductText'] I am able to search MaterialID.

Why it's not possible to search ID and Text?

entry.title: Re: IBP Excel Case Sensitivity
entry.content: Yes, that's what I mean.

entry.title: Re: Poor performance in API API_SALES_ORDER_SRV GET metho...
entry.content: Hi @rosenpetrov somewhere i have a gap in my understanding. are we talking about the standard coding in api_sales_order or about the call or own service, because of the extension?

entry.title: Where can I learn how to prepare and run a Business AI Explore Workshop?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Applying a Human-Centered Approach to Identify and Define Business AI Use Cases learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey explains in detail how to run two interactive sessions aimed at exploring and defining AI use cases based on business and user needs. 
Challenge: Spot the Differences and Win!
Throughout the lessons of this training, our crafty speakers have made some sneaky changes in the set. Can you catch them?
Your Mission: Watch closely all videos and note differences in the set between videos from different lessons (e.g. different plant between lesson 1 and 3). Note as many as possible and send your list to apphaus@sap.com.
What's in it for you?
The first 10 participants to send 20 differences will receive a printed set of the Opportunity, Limitation, and Ideation cards - perfect for your Business AI Explore and Design workshops!

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will be able to:

  • Prepare and run a Business AI Explore Workshop with strategic decision makers to ideate and identify AI use cases with business value.
  • Prepare and run a Business AI Design workshop with business and IT experts to understand user requirements for a use case idea or existing process, ideate valuable AI capabilities to improve it, and define a future user experience enriched with AI.

 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Issue eDocument Cockpit Greece - MyData
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

We received the following error from MyData in Greece for our Invoice. 

S:101:000 Line:1.Position:1020.The element 'invoice' in namespace 'http://www.aade.gr/myDATA/invoice/v1. 0' has invalid child element 'invoiceSummary' in namespace 'http://www.aade.gr/myDATA/invoice/v1.

Do you know how we can overcome that?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Can we discuss SAP ABAP Platform 2022 SP01, Developer Edition on Cloud Appliance Library (CAL)
entry.content:
Hi 

I'm generally interested in ABAP testdrives. I don't use them for much, but for more than 20 years I have seen it as a challenge to make the newest version run.
I have currently ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01 running on Docker and this time I am actually using the testdrive to evaluate if it is also time for me to switch from SE38 to Eclipse 🤔

I can see that this version (Developer Trial 2022 SP01) also exist in a CAL / cloud version, but i'm not sure it is actually the same product? When reading the getting started guide, I get the impression that it is actually the same product - just running in cloud instead of on-premise(docker), but when I read the recommended VM sizes I don't understand anything.

The recommended size for the cloud version is 32 cores and 256 GB memory, but I run the Docker version on a labtop with 10 cores in total and out of 32 GB ram, only 20 GB is assigned to Docker . 

The cost of a Cloud VM with 32 cores and 256 GB is astronomic (from a freelance ABAP'ers point of view) and I find it hard to believe that anyone use this option?

  1. Why is the the required memory for the cloud version more than 10 times higher than the Docker version?
  2. Did I completely misunderstand everything?

@julieplummer20 

Regards Thomas 

PS. I didn't really find a suitable "SAP Managed Tag" for this question, so I hope that it hits a suitable place in the Community.

entry.title: Re: Log into new Client with SAP*
entry.content:
Hello Victor,

you need to delete SAP* user from SU01 in the respective client you want to log in with SAP* Kerneluser. There is a difference between SAP* User in SU01 and SAP* User in Kernel. 

Furthermore login/no_automatic_user_sapstar is client independent it is valid for all clients, also you need to restart your system after changing this parameter. SCC4 is also client independent.

so go on like this

- delete SAP* user from SU01 in client 101

- set login/no_automatic_user_sapstar to 0 

- restart system

after that you should be able to login into client 101 with Kerneluser SAP* and pass

password of SAP* is release dependent i guess, but pass should do the trick

 

best regards

entry.title: ES version, if there are more than 100,000 fixed assets, the impact on the operation of the system
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud 公共版#SAP S4HANA Cloud 公共版财务#SAP S4HANA Cloud ;在 SAP ES 版本中，如果固定资产超过 100,000 个，对系统运行的影响，系统运行是否非常缓慢？

entry.title: Eclipse connected to ABAP BTP with AI Core available: Still no generative AI options available
entry.content:
Hi,

we're currently trying to follow this tutorial: https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-AD180/tree/main

 

I've installed the latest Eclipse Version 24-09, and pulled the latest ADT.

 

 

I am connecting to an ABAP Environment on the BTP, and we're running an instance of the AI Core on the subaccount.

However, i'm still not able to use the feature "Generate OData UI Service using GenAI". According to the tutorial, it should look like this:

 
 

However, this option is not offered.

What do we miss? Is there any special connection that needs to be setup between the ABAP environment and the AI Core? Are there further prerequisites to get this feature to appear in Eclipse?

Thanks In Advance!

Best Regards

Florian

entry.title: Re: IBP Excel Case Sensitivity
entry.content: Unfortunately that didn't make any difference

entry.title: Insights Needed: Managing Complex Relationships with Secondary Hierarchy in SAP SuccessFactors Compe
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently working on the implementation of SAP SuccessFactors Compensation and would like to gather your insights and experiences regarding the management of complex relationships using the secondary hierarchy feature.

In our scenario, we need to account for additional relationships in the compensation process, including:

Distinct final approvers based on employee `groups`.

Specific tracking roles for certain types of employees.

An extended hierarchy chain involving employees and managers across different legal entities.

I’m particularly looking to understand how the secondary hierarchy in Compensation can be configured to:

Manage these complex relationships without disrupting the standard hierarchy.

Enable flexibility in workflows for salary and bonus reviews.

Ensure the system remains performant and maintainable, even with a large user base.

If any of you have faced similar challenges or implemented effective solutions, I would love to hear your thoughts! Any advice on best practices or key points to keep in mind would also be greatly appreciated.

To provide some context, here are the key links for remuneration roles and their descriptions in our setup:

Valideur_Final_Rémunération_Classes_Groupe_A: Final approver for Group A or Class.

Valideur_Final_Rémunération_Groupes_B_C: Final approver for Groups B or C.

Manager_Rémunération_Classes_Groupe_A: Submitter for Group A or Class.

Manager_Rémunération_Groupes_B_C: Submitter for Groups B or C.

RH_Rémunération_Classes_Groupe_A: HR monitor for Group A or Class.

RH_Rémunération_Groupes_B_C: HR monitor for Groups B or C.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Regards,

entry.title: Please can someone explain how to unflag for deletion a reference operation set. (cp 431)
Re: Cannot Download AdobeForm Template from SAP Business...
entry.content: (posted by mistake, cannot delete it, sorry)

entry.title: Re: Cannot Download AdobeForm Template from SAP Business...
entry.content: Hi Harshal, Thanks for your reply. As I wrote, the ZIP file was completely empty (0 Bytes), and that was only once. Afterwards, nothing happens - no file download. To address your points: 1) I worked with the form a month ago with no problems - I made multiple down and uploads with changing the form meanhwile with Adobe LiveCycle Designer. I did not use Cloud Application Studio. Your point 2) makes sense. Thanks, Igor

entry.title: Re: Association in CDS View Extension is not exposed in the OData of main CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Nikolas,

Can you explain how you have exposed association targets  in the OData service. I have a similar case where I extended a Standard CDS view to add new Virtual column that is calculated in frontend. But here I need to implement filteration for that field. 

To implement filter I followed the way described in below blog but I am getting that association not defined error. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/filtering-on-association-property-in-fiori-element-app-via-abap-cds-virtual/ba-p/13458892

entry.title: Re: How to Dynamically Update Workflow Steps in SAP Build...
entry.content: Process Variant support was released in the past couple of weeks for Build Process Automation. With this, you can configure the variant selection when you trigger the process.

entry.title: Account determination for interests posting in public cloud
entry.content: I use the Fiori Schedule Interest Calculation job to automatically calculate and post interest. The default GL account for credit interest is set via the account symbol (e.g., 7010000). However, I need to distinguish between domestic, foreign, or related companies based on the business partner (BP) in order to post interest to the correct GL accounts (e.g., 70101000, 70102000, etc.). I can't combine the account symbol with the business partner. SSCUI 106241 and 100297 don't provide a solution. Is there any BAdI available or an easier way?"

entry.title: Re: REVIEW: New Layout / Features for SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Is there a way to switch to the old interface for folks who are just wrapping up a project.

entry.title: Compensation Performance Monitoring Tools
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I recently received a question from a customer who is experiencing performance issues with their SFSF Compensation module. These performance drops have been inconsistent so they can be quite unpredictable. Upon these issues, They have asked me about performance monitoring tools that SAP has available. Sometimes, customers can build their own tool to track their system performance.

With this in mind, If anyone has any tools that we can provide for them to help them in finding/developing their own tools. Please let me know so we can organize a meeting/ demonstration.

entry.title: Re: Multiple Corporate IdP (same entity ID) in IAS
entry.content: @steven_foo: Which solution did you end up with?

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Time Management Workshop agenda and Questionnaire
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could anybody lend their expertise or provide their insights for a basic workshop agenda template points and a standard questionnaire to guide the initial discovery and requirements gathering sessions for a fresh SAP SuccessFactors Time Management implementation?

If there are any standard documents or templates provided by SAP for Time Management workshops, please let me know. Any leads or assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support and assistance!

Best regards,
Aesha

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Performance Issues in SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP BW/4HANA live connection
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Currently, I am creating stories (dashboards + tables) in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), I handle all the data preparation in SAP BW/4HANA. There, I have implemented calculation views, composite providers, and BEx queries that fetch data through replication connection via SLT from S/4HANA. Subsequently, using a live connection between BW and SAC, I create models in SAC and then build the stories. The stories simply display the data, and I haven’t implemented any additional calculations.

However, I am facing severe performance issues that I cannot justify, as my dataset is minimal. For instance, one model has only 3,271 rows and 47 columns.

The stories are slow to load, even those that only contain a simple table. This happens across different models that I’ve implemented.

Since I haven’t worked with this specific architecture before, I would greatly appreciate any guidance on where I should start investigating the root cause of these significant performance issues. Any advice would be highly appreciated!

 SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: How to convert binary base64 string to BMP image and upload to SE78 Tx. through program
entry.content:
Hi Sandra_Rossi,

Thank you for your quick response, is there any way we can upload binary base64 string to .BMP extension in SAP ABAP ? and one more thing regarding "specialized software" any idea and which needs to be integrated with SAP.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: custom splash screen for mdk branded client
entry.content:
Hello, seems i am still not getting this to work.

 

i've done this:

but the splash screen is still not getting set. Am i missing somehting?

entry.title: Re: DMEE Tables
entry.content:
See OSS note 2820775

It provides an Excel file with the mapping of each FPAYH, FPAYHX and FPAYP field

entry.title: Your user's permissions are not sufficient for accessing the console.
entry.content:
Hi!

I had before access to SAP CDC console, but I asked my manager to delete my access as there were some issues. After that, I asked again for access, I received the mail service from mail-service@gigya-raas.com with the invitation, however, when I add my email, I receive this message: "Email already exists". When I am trying to log in to the console with the same email address, I receive: "Access denied, Your user's permissions are not sufficient for accessing the console."

Can you please help?

entry.title: Re: DME - Can you please let me know the table to check t...
entry.content:
See OSS note 2820775

It contains an Excel file with the source of all fields in  FPAYH, FPAYHX and FPAYP

entry.title: Re: Identity authentication to different Corporate Idp based on email domains in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @vinayakc123 ,

would a similar setup work, where we do not rely in importing the users into IAS in a "pure" proxy Corporate IdP scenario? Basically we want to have two Azure Apps from an Azure IdP point of view that point to the same IAS but different Apps (in our Case SF and IBP hosted on the same IAS).

As far as I can tell (which could easily be wrong) you are using provisioning to route the users to two distinct user groups SSO_Company1 and SSO_Compony2. In our case, if we would need those groups they would e.g. be named "Group_SF" and "Group_IDP"

My questions

  1. Is the provisioning part mandatory and will the users really being created and persisted in the respective user group within IAS or will they only be virtually mapped to the user group on-demand and not being persisted?
  2. Is there a way to have two IdPs like "Azure_SF" and "Azure_IBP" without the Concept of Groups?

Many thanks and kind regards

Jens

entry.title: Re: Compensation Performance Monitoring Tools
entry.content:
Hi @niallwalker98 

I am not aware of a Performance monitoring tool however I made this blog a few years ago about configurations that lead to latency:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-avoid-latency-in-the-compensation-module/ba-p/13494045

If you create a ticket to support our engineers can use Splunk to determine exactly what is causing the latency (they will see pages and pages of code when the latency is happening and will be able to say what the issue is pretty quickly), I've inserted instructions at the bottom of the blogs on getting the x unique id for faster splunk processing.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Base64 String Issues When Posting Attachments via ODa...
entry.content: I think you might be confounded by the description of the api. It is the response that is a JSON structure. The payload for request is binary data containing the file contents. All the parameters (Slug, Content-Type, LinkedSAPObjectKey, BusinessObjectTypeName) have to be set with headers.

entry.title: Re: Calling Secured iFlow from SAPUI5
entry.content: You don't call the integration suite endpoints directly from browser (from UI5 code). You instead call a proxy (reverse) endpoint with which the user have already authenticated. That proxy takes care of the authentication with integration suite endpoint. In a standard BTP application this endpoint will be from approuter (standalone or managed), When using approuter, the integration endpoint can be configured as a destination. Destination service and approuter together takes care of authentication.  You can find material in the community and learning.sap.com on how to go about this in detail. It is the same setup for every UI5 application hosted in BTP. Only the destination configuration changes.

entry.title: API Enterprise Project using SAC and S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have successsfully tested the Enterprise Project API, using the Postman application. With Postman we have simulated this API and were able to create na enterprise project and its WBS Elements.

This is the API link that we've configured to simulate this connection: https://my412440-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_ENTERPRISE_PROJECT_SRV;v=0002/A_EnterpriseProject

To use the API we have created a communication user (TESTEAPIPROJ), a communication system (SAC_S4HANA_PROJ) and the communication arrangement (SAP_COM_0308). We have attached screenshot of the mentioned objects in the document "API Enterprise Project using SAC and S4 Public Cloud.pdf".

The final step would be to connect SAC to the API so that we can create an enterprise project in the S/4HANA Public Cloud system from SAP Analytics Cloud.

In SAC we created a connection (testeodata) with basic authentication type. The user associated to this connection is the communication user that we have used previously in this process. Also, in SAC, we cannot copy the full API link. The system only accepts until https://my412440-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_ENTERPRISE_PROJECT_SRV;v=0002

However, in this system, we are not able to specify the method to call the previously mentioned API.

How should we proceed to connect both systems using this API?

Best regards,

Francisco

entry.title: Re: Compensation Performance Monitoring Tools
entry.content: Hi Xavier, We are looking for examples of custom tools. if you are aware of customers creating their own, but I have forwarded the blog post and your comments to colleagues. I will let you know if I hear anything back.

Thank you,
Nikhil

entry.title: How to activate Add, Edit button in app "Manage Commodity Codes"?
entry.content: I have an issue that I cannot edit or add commodity codes in app "Manage Commodity Codes". The buttons are invisible. How can I enable them?

entry.title: Missing IBAN Services from SAP BTP Service Entitlement / Discovery Center
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Few months back IBAN Services was available as pert of SAP BTP service. But recently I don't see this available now in Discovery Center / SAP BTP service entitlement.

I have captured the link and screenshot of the service few months back. But it's not opening now. Is this service decommissioned by SAP, please suggest further.

SAP Discovery Center Service - IBAN service (cloud.sap)
Inital Setup | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Condition Contract - Fixed Amount Distribution in Settlement Document
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

In condition contract, percentage base rebate calculation work as per expectation. It is considering negative value such as credit note or cancel invoice value for rebate base value and accrual also updated in negative amount.

But in case of fixed about based rebate calculation, it's considering all value for rebate base value but accruals is always positive. So, I want to know if this is a standard behavior of fixed amount-based rebate calculation or through configuration/customization we can avoid considering negative value.

Thanks,

Arindam

entry.title: Contingent Worker ID Generation does not work as before
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Contingent Worker ID Generation does not work as before, Emp ID with CW prefix was generated. Now only a number is generated.

After 1H2024 Release, it was possible to opting out of the feature "Enable Centralized Services to Add Contingent Worker and Add Assignment" in Company System and Logo Settings, the Employee ID of Contingent Workers was generated as per the business rule again.

Now it is not possible to opt out "Enable Centralized Services to Add Contingent Worker and Add Assignment" feature. Currently User ID Generation for Contingent Worker follows the "Next Employee ID Assigned" in Company System and Logo Settings. However it does not support alphanumeric values having the CW prefix. 

Do you have the same issue? Have you found any solution to fix this problem? I opened a SAP support ticket and the agent said that there is no solution for this issue. But maybe there is a special workaround what can help to keep the original settings and continue using CW prefix in the Employee ID of the CWs.

Thanks.
Regards,
Szabi

entry.title: Re: How to convert binary base64 string to BMP image and upload to SE78 Tx. through program
entry.content:
Just to be clear, your string of characters in base64 was used to encode a PNG image (based on what you have said). You may encode any sequence of bytes into Base64, it's not related to any format, see here: Base64 - Wikipedia.

So, your question is how to convert PNG to BMP. Try IGS -> https://www.google.com/search?q=abap+convert+png+to+bmp+-jpeg+-jpg+site%3Asap.com.
